does_not_claim: full Talagrand proof for all nonnegative x
name: Audited Four-Level Talagrand Closure Theorem
remaining_global_obligation: extend the same Act/Vandermonde/H2 certificate over the full four-level profile table, or prove a level-reduction theorem that reduces the full problem to the audited band.
scope: audited four-level scenic profile band with rest_size <= 6, shells w=12 and w=16
statement: For the audited band, every three-level face appearing under Act has an exact nonnegative three-level shell-gap certificate.
The same-boundary horn-cycle sector factors through the four-variable Vandermonde and is killed by ordinary color-symmetric shell readout.
The H2 face-residue sector, after Act, lands in the already-certified three-level nonnegative cone.
Therefore the audited four-level obstruction to the Talagrand shell functional vanishes or is nonnegative after public actor readout.
